Fairwinds  /  Fleet  /  Cantius 50

Cantius 50

50' Italian Sport Cruiser · Newport Beach

50' Cranchi Cantius Power Yacht

Cantius 50

The Cranchi Cantius 50 is the definitive expression of modern Italian sport-cruiser design. Sleek, athletic, and unmistakably confident on the water, she combines serious performance with the kind of deck space and amenities that make a day on the water feel genuinely indulgent.

Her large aft cockpit and swim platform invite easy water access, while the hardtop saloon keeps guests comfortable in any weather. The Cantius is Newport Harbor at its most effortless — perfect for coastal day trips, entertaining a group in style, or a fast passage to Catalina without committing to a full sailing charter.

With room for ten guests and a spirited pair of engines, the Cantius 50 is the versatile, high-energy choice for those who want luxury and performance in equal measure.
